listening.title: Listening: History facts
listening.transcript: The telephone was invented by Alexander Graham Bell. This bridge was built about thirty years ago.

questions.question: Who invented the telephone?
questions.explanation: "The telephone was invented by Alexander Graham Bell."

listening.title: Listening: News update
listening.transcript: The news has already been published online. The results have just been reported on TV.

questions.question: Where was the news published?
questions.explanation: "The news has already been published online."
